description: Every Strava feature, plus offline analytics — training load, power curves, zone time, and segment progression — that the website can't show you.

tools.name: activities_create-activity
tools.description: Creates a manual activity for an athlete, requires activity:write scope. Required: elapsed_time, name, sport_type, start_date_local. Optional: commute, description, distance (plus 2 more). Returns the new SwaggerActivityDetailedActivity.

params.name: commute
params.description: Set to 1 to mark as commute.

params.name: sport_type
params.description: Sport type of activity. For example - Run, MountainBikeRide, Ride, etc.

params.name: trainer
params.description: Set to 1 to mark as a trainer activity.

params.name: type
params.description: Type of activity. For example - Run, Ride etc.

tools.name: activities_get-activity-by-id
tools.description: Returns the given activity that is owned by the authenticated athlete. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities. We strongly encourage you to display the appropriate attribution that identifies Garmin as the data source and the device name in your application. Please see example below from VeloViewer (that provides an attribution for a Garmin Forerunner device). ![Attribution](/images/device-attribution-image.png). Required: id. Optional: include_all_efforts.

tools.name: activities_update-activity-by-id
tools.description: Updates the given activity that is owned by the authenticated athlete. Requires activity:write. Also requires activity:read_all in order to update Only Me activities. Required: id. Optional: commute, description, gear_id (plus 5 more). Returns the updated SwaggerActivityDetailedActivity.

params.name: commute
params.description: Whether this activity is a commute

params.name: gear_id
params.description: Identifier for the gear associated with the activity. ‘none’ clears gear from activity

params.name: sport_type
params.description: An enumeration of the sport types an activity may have. Distinct from ActivityType in that it has new types (e.g. MountainBikeRide)

params.name: trainer
params.description: Whether this activity was recorded on a training machine

params.name: type
params.description: An enumeration of the types an activity may have. Note that this enumeration does not include new sport types (e.g. MountainBikeRide, EMountainBikeRide), activities with these sport types will have the corresponding activity type (e.g. Ride for MountainBikeRide, EBikeRide for EMountainBikeRide)

tools.name: activities_comments_get-by-activity-id
tools.description: Returns the comments on the given activity. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities. Required: id. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30), page_size (default: 30) (plus 1 more).

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

params.name: after_cursor
params.description: Cursor of the last item in the previous page of results, used to request the subsequent page of results. When omitted, the first page of results is fetched.

tools.name: activities_kudos_get-kudoers-by-activity-id
tools.description: Returns the athletes who kudoed an activity identified by an identifier. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities. Required: id. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30).

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: activities_laps_get-by-activity-id
tools.description: Returns the laps of an activity identified by an identifier. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities. Required: id.

tools.name: activities_streams_get-activity
tools.description: Returns the given activity's streams. Requires activity:read scope. Requires activity:read_all scope for Only Me activities. Required: id, keys, key_by_type (default: true).

tools.name: activities_zones_get-by-activity-id
tools.description: Summit Feature. Returns the zones of a given activity. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities. Required: id.

tools.name: athlete_get-logged-in
tools.description: Returns the currently authenticated athlete. Tokens with profile:read_all scope will receive a detailed athlete representation; all others will receive a summary representation.

tools.name: athlete_get-logged-in-activities
tools.description: Returns the activities of an athlete for a specific identifier. Requires activity:read. Only Me activities will be filtered out unless requested by a token with activity:read_all. Optional: before, after, page (plus 1 more).

params.name: before
params.description: An epoch timestamp to use for filtering activities that have taken place before a certain time.

params.name: after
params.description: An epoch timestamp to use for filtering activities that have taken place after a certain time.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: athlete_get-logged-in-clubs
tools.description: Returns a list of the clubs whose membership includes the authenticated athlete. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30).

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: athlete_get-logged-in-zones
tools.description: Returns the the authenticated athlete's heart rate and power zones. Requires profile:read_all.

tools.name: athlete_update-logged-in
tools.description: Update the currently authenticated athlete. Requires profile:write scope. Required: weight. Returns the updated SwaggerAthleteDetailedAthlete.

params.name: weight
params.description: The weight of the athlete in kilograms.

tools.name: athletes_routes_get-by-athlete-id
tools.description: Returns a list of the routes created by the authenticated athlete. Private routes are filtered out unless requested by a token with read_all scope. Required: id. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30).

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: athletes_stats_get
tools.description: Returns the activity stats of an athlete. Only includes data from activities set to Everyone visibilty. Required: id.

params.name: id
params.description: The identifier of the athlete. Must match the authenticated athlete.

tools.name: clubs_get-by-id
tools.description: Returns a given a club using its identifier. Required: id.

tools.name: clubs_activities_get-club-by-id
tools.description: Retrieve recent activities from members of a specific club. The authenticated athlete must belong to the requested club in order to hit this endpoint. Pagination is supported. Athlete profile visibility is respected for all activities. Required: id. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30). Returns array of SwaggerActivityClubActivity.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: clubs_admins_get-club-by-id
tools.description: Returns a list of the administrators of a given club. Required: id. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30).

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: clubs_members_get-club-by-id
tools.description: Returns a list of the athletes who are members of a given club. Required: id. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30).

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: gear_get-by-id
tools.description: Returns an equipment using its identifier. Required: id.

tools.name: routes_get-by-id
tools.description: Returns a route using its identifier. Requires read_all scope for private routes. Required: id.

tools.name: routes_export-gpx_get-route-as-gpx
tools.description: Returns a GPX file of the route. Requires read_all scope for private routes. Required: id.

tools.name: routes_export-tcx_get-route-as-tcx
tools.description: Returns a TCX file of the route. Requires read_all scope for private routes. Required: id.

tools.name: routes_streams_get-route
tools.description: Returns the given route's streams. Requires read_all scope for private routes. Required: id.

tools.name: segment-efforts_get-by-id
tools.description: Returns a segment effort from an activity that is owned by the authenticated athlete. Requires subscription. Required: id.

params.name: id
params.description: The identifier of the segment effort.

tools.name: segment-efforts_get-efforts-by-segment-id
tools.description: Returns a set of the authenticated athlete's segment efforts for a given segment. Requires subscription. Required: segment_id. Optional: start_date_local, end_date_local, per_page (default: 30).

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: segment-efforts_streams_get-segment-effort
tools.description: Returns a set of streams for a segment effort completed by the authenticated athlete. Requires read_all scope. Required: id, keys, key_by_type (default: true).

params.name: id
params.description: The identifier of the segment effort.

params.name: keys
params.description: The types of streams to return.

tools.name: segments_explore
tools.description: Returns the top 10 segments matching a specified query. Required: bounds. Optional: activity_type, min_cat, max_cat.

params.name: bounds
params.description: The latitude and longitude for two points describing a rectangular boundary for the search: [southwest corner latitutde, southwest corner longitude, northeast corner latitude, northeast corner longitude]

tools.name: segments_get-by-id
tools.description: Returns the specified segment. read_all scope required in order to retrieve athlete-specific segment information, or to retrieve private segments. Required: id.

tools.name: segments_get-logged-in-athlete-starred
tools.description: List of the authenticated athlete's starred segments. Private segments are filtered out unless requested by a token with read_all scope. Optional: page, per_page (default: 30). Returns array of SwaggerSegmentSummarySegment.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: segments_starred_star-segment
tools.description: Stars/Unstars the given segment for the authenticated athlete. Requires profile:write scope. Required: id, starred (default: false). Returns the updated SwaggerSegmentDetailedSegment.

params.name: id
params.description: The identifier of the segment to star.

params.name: starred
params.description: If true, star the segment; if false, unstar the segment.

tools.name: segments_streams_get-segment
tools.description: Returns the given segment's streams. Requires read_all scope for private segments. Required: id, keys, key_by_type (default: true).

params.name: keys
params.description: The types of streams to return.

tools.name: uploads_create
tools.description: Uploads a new data file to create an activity from. Requires activity:write scope. Optional: commute, data_type, description (plus 4 more). Returns the new SwaggerUploadUpload.

params.name: commute
params.description: Whether the resulting activity should be tagged as a commute.

params.name: data_type
params.description: The format of the uploaded file.

params.name: description
params.description: The desired description of the resulting activity.

params.name: external_id
params.description: The desired external identifier of the resulting activity.

params.name: name
params.description: The desired name of the resulting activity.

params.name: trainer
params.description: Whether the resulting activity should be marked as having been performed on a trainer.

tools.name: uploads_get-by-id
tools.description: Returns an upload for a given identifier. Requires activity:write scope. Required: uploadId.
